channel.title: College Composition Committee on Michael Healy's ePortfolio
channel.description: Recent content in College Composition Committee on Michael Healy's ePortfolio

item.title: College Composition Committee
item.description: Have been a member of the college composition committee at FSU since the fall of 2016. Have worked on developing materials for GTAs, rubrics, syllabi, lesson plans, and in-class activities. Have revised resource strands for teachers and instructors. Have worked to select a new textbook for ENC 1101 and developed teaching materials for the book. Well help facilitate workshops for on going teacher development in the spring of 2019.
